problem: How to desalinate seawater at dramatically lower energy cost than reverse osmosis?
mechanism: Mycorrhizal network enhancement for nutrient cycling
hypothesis: If Mycorrhizal network enhancement for nutrient cycling is applied to than, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Life cycle assessment with 4 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
